title: 機場報到
desc: 劃位、託運行李、找登機門

phrases.en: Hi, we're checking in for the flight to Tokyo.
phrases.zh: 你好，我們要辦飛東京的登機手續。
phrases.tip: check in = 報到；報班機號更清楚：flight JL802

phrases.en: Here are our passports and booking confirmation.
phrases.zh: 這是我們的護照和訂位確認單。
phrases.tip: booking confirmation = 訂位確認；也可說 e-ticket

phrases.en: We're a family of four traveling together.
phrases.zh: 我們一家四口一起旅行。
phrases.tip: 希望坐一起可加：Could we sit together?

phrases.en: Could we get seats together, please?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我們劃在一起嗎？

phrases.en: Could I have an aisle seat, please?
phrases.zh: 可以給我走道的位子嗎？
phrases.tip: aisle seat = 走道座位；window seat = 靠窗

phrases.en: Is there any chance of an upgrade to premium economy?
phrases.zh: 有機會升等豪華經濟艙嗎？
phrases.tip: 委婉問法；upgrade = 升等

phrases.en: I'd like to check in these two bags.
phrases.zh: 我要託運這兩件行李。
phrases.tip: check in bags = 託運行李

phrases.en: This one's a carry-on, I'll take it on board.
phrases.zh: 這件是手提行李，我要帶上飛機。
phrases.tip: carry-on = 手提／登機行李

phrases.en: How much is the excess baggage fee?
phrases.zh: 行李超重要收多少錢？
phrases.tip: excess baggage = 超重行李；overweight 也可

phrases.en: Could you tag this bag as fragile, please?
phrases.zh: 可以幫這件貼易碎標籤嗎？
phrases.tip: fragile = 易碎

phrases.en: Will our bags be checked all the way through to Osaka?
phrases.zh: 我們的行李會直接掛到大阪嗎？
phrases.tip: 轉機時很實用；all the way through = 直掛到底

phrases.en: What time does boarding start?
phrases.zh: 幾點開始登機？
phrases.tip: boarding = 登機

phrases.en: Which gate does this flight leave from?
phrases.zh: 這班飛機從哪個登機門出發？
phrases.tip: gate = 登機門

phrases.en: Sorry, I can't find gate 23. Which way is it?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，我找不到23號登機門，往哪邊走？
phrases.tip: 迷路時用；Which way = 往哪走

phrases.en: Excuse me, is our flight delayed? The board says so.
phrases.zh: 請問我們這班有延誤嗎？看板上寫延誤。
phrases.tip: delayed = 延誤；the board = 航班看板

phrases.en: Our connection is really tight. Can we board first?
phrases.zh: 我們轉機時間很趕，可以先登機嗎？
phrases.tip: connection = 轉機；tight = 時間很趕

lines.en: Good morning! Where are you flying today?
lines.zh: 早安！請問今天飛哪裡？

lines.en: Good morning. We're going to Tokyo. Here are our four passports.
lines.zh: 早安。我們要去東京，這是我們四個人的護照。

lines.en: Thank you. How many bags are you checking in?
lines.zh: 謝謝。請問要託運幾件行李？

lines.en: Three bags to check in, and each of us has a carry-on.
lines.zh: 託運三件，我們每個人各有一件手提行李。

lines.en: Perfect. Please put the first bag on the scale.
lines.zh: 好的，請把第一件行李放上磅秤。

lines.en: Sure. Could you seat us all together? And I'd like an aisle seat if possible.
lines.zh: 好。可以幫我們劃在一起嗎？如果可以，我想要走道的位子。

lines.en: Of course. I've got you in a row of four, with two aisle seats.
lines.zh: 沒問題，我幫你們安排同一排四個位子，有兩個走道座位。

lines.en: That's great, thank you. What time does boarding start?
lines.zh: 太好了，謝謝。請問幾點開始登機？

lines.en: Boarding begins at 10:30 from gate 42. It's a bit of a walk, so leave some time.
lines.zh: 十點半從42號登機門開始登機，路有點遠，請預留一點時間。

lines.en: Got it. And will our bags go all the way through to our final stop?
lines.zh: 了解。我們的行李會直掛到最終目的地嗎？

lines.en: Yes, they're tagged straight through. Here are your boarding passes. Have a great trip!
lines.zh: 會的，行李直掛到底。這是你們的登機證，祝旅途愉快！

lines.en: Thank you so much. Have a nice day!
lines.zh: 非常謝謝你，祝你有美好的一天！

title: 出入境海關
desc: 移民官問答、入境卡、海關申報

phrases.en: Good morning. Here's my passport.
phrases.zh: 早安，這是我的護照。
phrases.tip: 遞護照時的基本開場

phrases.en: We're here on vacation, just for sightseeing.
phrases.zh: 我們是來度假觀光的。
phrases.tip: on vacation = 度假；on business = 出差

phrases.en: We're staying for ten days.
phrases.zh: 我們會待十天。
phrases.tip: 直接講天數最清楚

phrases.en: We're staying at a hotel in the city center.
phrases.zh: 我們住在市中心的一間飯店。
phrases.tip: 可補地址：the address is on the form

phrases.en: This is my wife, and these are our two kids.
phrases.zh: 這是我太太，這兩位是我們的小孩。
phrases.tip: 全家一起過關時很好用

phrases.en: We're traveling together as a family.
phrases.zh: 我們是一家人一起旅行。
phrases.tip: as a family = 以家庭為單位

phrases.en: Sorry, could you say that again, please?
phrases.zh: 抱歉，可以再說一次嗎？
phrases.tip: 聽不懂時很禮貌；別緊張

phrases.en: Excuse me, could you speak a little slower?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，可以講慢一點嗎？
phrases.tip: speak slower = 講慢一點

phrases.en: Could you help me fill out this arrival card?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我填這張入境卡嗎？
phrases.tip: arrival card = 入境卡；landing card 同義

phrases.en: What should I write in this box?
phrases.zh: 這一欄要寫什麼？
phrases.tip: box = 欄位；field 也可

phrases.en: I have nothing to declare.
phrases.zh: 我沒有東西要申報。
phrases.tip: 海關綠色通道常用；declare = 申報

phrases.en: These are just some snacks and gifts for family.
phrases.zh: 這些只是一些零食和給家人的禮物。
phrases.tip: gifts = 禮物；被問時解釋用

phrases.en: Do I need to declare this? It's for personal use.
phrases.zh: 這個需要申報嗎？是自己用的。
phrases.tip: personal use = 個人使用

phrases.en: We're not carrying any food or fresh fruit.
phrases.zh: 我們沒有帶任何食物或新鮮水果。
phrases.tip: 很多國家管制農產品

phrases.en: Where do we go to collect our luggage?
phrases.zh: 請問要去哪裡領行李？
phrases.tip: collect luggage = 領行李

phrases.en: Is this the right line for foreign passports?
phrases.zh: 這是外國護照排的隊嗎？
phrases.tip: line = 隊伍（英式：queue）

lines.en: Next, please. Passports, everyone.
lines.zh: 下一位，請大家出示護照。

lines.en: Good morning. Here are the four passports for our family.
lines.zh: 早安，這是我們一家四口的護照。

lines.en: Thank you. What's the purpose of your visit?
lines.zh: 謝謝。請問來訪目的是什麼？

lines.en: We're here on vacation, just sightseeing with the kids.
lines.zh: 我們來度假，帶小孩觀光而已。

lines.en: How long are you planning to stay?
lines.zh: 你們打算待多久？

lines.en: Ten days. Then we fly back to Taiwan.
lines.zh: 十天，然後就飛回台灣。

lines.en: And where will you be staying?
lines.zh: 你們會住在哪裡？

lines.en: At a hotel in the city center. The address is on our arrival card.
lines.zh: 住在市中心的一間飯店，地址寫在入境卡上。

lines.en: Are you carrying any food or fresh produce?
lines.zh: 有攜帶任何食物或生鮮農產品嗎？

lines.en: No, nothing to declare. Just some snacks and gifts for family.
lines.zh: 沒有，沒有東西要申報，只有一些零食和給家人的禮物。

lines.en: Alright. Please look at the camera. Thank you — enjoy your stay!
lines.zh: 好的，請看鏡頭。謝謝，祝你們玩得愉快！

lines.en: Thank you very much. Have a good day!
lines.zh: 非常謝謝你，祝你有美好的一天！

title: 行李提領
desc: 領行李、行李遺失、行李推車

phrases.en: Which carousel is for the flight from Taipei?
phrases.zh: 台北來的班機是哪個行李轉盤？
phrases.tip: carousel = 行李轉盤；belt 也可

phrases.en: The board says our bags are on belt five.
phrases.zh: 看板顯示我們的行李在五號轉盤。
phrases.tip: belt = 行李輸送帶

phrases.en: Excuse me, where can I find a luggage cart?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，哪裡有行李推車？
phrases.tip: luggage cart = 行李推車（英式 trolley）

phrases.en: Are the carts free, or do I need coins?
phrases.zh: 推車是免費的，還是要投幣？
phrases.tip: 有些機場要押幣

phrases.en: Could you give me a hand with this heavy bag?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我搬一下這件很重的行李嗎？
phrases.tip: give me a hand = 幫個忙

phrases.en: I think that black suitcase is ours.
phrases.zh: 我想那個黑色行李箱是我們的。
phrases.tip: suitcase = 行李箱

phrases.en: Wait, that one looks just like ours — let me check the tag.
phrases.zh: 等等，那個跟我們的很像，我看一下吊牌。
phrases.tip: 很多行李長得一樣，先核對

phrases.en: We've been waiting a while and one bag hasn't come out.
phrases.zh: 我們等了一陣子，有一件行李還沒出來。
phrases.tip: 行李遲遲不來時說

phrases.en: I think my suitcase is missing. Where do I report it?
phrases.zh: 我的行李箱好像不見了，要去哪裡申報？
phrases.tip: missing = 遺失；report = 申報

phrases.en: Here's my baggage claim tag and boarding pass.
phrases.zh: 這是我的行李託運吊牌和登機證。
phrases.tip: claim tag = 託運吊牌（報遺失要用）

phrases.en: It's a large red hard-shell suitcase with wheels.
phrases.zh: 那是一個紅色的大硬殼行李箱，有輪子。
phrases.tip: 描述特徵：顏色+材質+大小

phrases.en: Could you deliver it to our hotel once you find it?
phrases.zh: 找到之後可以幫我們送到飯店嗎？
phrases.tip: deliver = 送達；常見服務

phrases.en: How long does it usually take to track down a lost bag?
phrases.zh: 找回遺失行李通常要多久？
phrases.tip: track down = 追查找回

phrases.en: One of our bags looks damaged — the wheel is broken.
phrases.zh: 我們有一件行李看起來壞了，輪子斷了。
phrases.tip: damaged = 損壞；可要求理賠

phrases.en: Where's the exit after we've got all our bags?
phrases.zh: 我們拿完行李後，出口在哪裡？
phrases.tip: exit = 出口

phrases.en: Is the taxi stand right outside this exit?
phrases.zh: 計程車招呼站就在這個出口外面嗎？
phrases.tip: taxi stand = 計程車招呼站

dialogue.title: 行李沒出來，去服務櫃檯

lines.en: Hi, we've collected three bags, but one suitcase never came out.
lines.zh: 你好，我們領到三件行李，但有一個行李箱一直沒出來。

lines.en: I'm sorry to hear that. May I see your claim tag and boarding pass?
lines.zh: 很抱歉。可以看一下您的行李吊牌和登機證嗎？

lines.en: Sure, here they are. It was on the flight from Taipei.
lines.zh: 當然，在這裡。是台北來的那班飛機。

lines.en: Thank you. Can you describe the missing bag for me?
lines.zh: 謝謝。可以描述一下遺失的行李嗎？

lines.en: It's a large red hard-shell suitcase with four wheels.
lines.zh: 那是一個紅色的大硬殼行李箱，有四個輪子。

lines.en: Got it. It looks like it's still in Taipei and will arrive tonight.
lines.zh: 了解。看起來它還在台北，今晚會到。

lines.en: Oh no. Could you deliver it to our hotel once it arrives?
lines.zh: 糟糕。到了之後可以幫我們送到飯店嗎？

lines.en: Of course. Please write your hotel name and address here.
lines.zh: 當然可以。請在這裡寫下飯店名稱和地址。

lines.en: Done. How long does it usually take?
lines.zh: 寫好了。通常要多久呢？

lines.en: Usually within 24 hours. Here's your reference number to track it.
lines.zh: 通常24小時內。這是您的查詢編號，可以用來追蹤。

lines.en: Thank you. Is there any compensation for the delay?
lines.zh: 謝謝。延誤有任何賠償嗎？

lines.en: You can claim basic expenses. Keep your receipts and contact us anytime.
lines.zh: 您可以申請基本費用補償，請保留收據，隨時與我們聯絡。

title: 租車
desc: 取車、保險、還車、車況說明

phrases.en: Hi, I have a reservation to pick up a car under the name Chen.
phrases.zh: 你好，我有預約要取車，訂位人的名字是 Chen。
phrases.tip: 報姓氏最快找到訂單，也可說 booking / reservation

phrases.en: Here's my driver's license, passport, and the credit card for the deposit.
phrases.zh: 這是我的駕照、護照，還有付押金用的信用卡。
phrases.tip: 台灣人記得帶國際駕照 International Driving Permit

phrases.en: Could I have an automatic car? I'm not used to driving a manual.
phrases.zh: 可以給我自排車嗎？我不太習慣開手排。
phrases.tip: 自排 automatic / 手排 manual (stick shift)

phrases.en: Does the price include full insurance, or do I need to add the CDW?
phrases.zh: 這個價錢有含全險嗎？還是我要另外加購 CDW？
phrases.tip: CDW = Collision Damage Waiver 碰撞損害免責

phrases.en: I'd like to add the full coverage so I don't have to worry about scratches.
phrases.zh: 我想加購全險，這樣有刮傷也不用擔心。
phrases.tip: 全險常說 full coverage / full insurance

phrases.en: What's the excess, or the amount I'd have to pay if there's an accident?
phrases.zh: 自負額是多少？就是萬一出事我要先付的金額。
phrases.tip: 自負額 excess (英式) / deductible (美式)

phrases.en: How much is the deposit, and when will it be refunded?
phrases.zh: 押金要多少？大概什麼時候會退還？
phrases.tip: 押金 deposit，通常還車後幾天退回

phrases.en: Can I add a child seat? My daughter is four years old.
phrases.zh: 可以加一張兒童座椅嗎？我女兒四歲。
phrases.tip: 兒童座椅 child seat / booster seat 增高墊

phrases.en: Does the car come with a GPS, or should I just use my phone?
phrases.zh: 車上有附衛星導航嗎？還是我用手機就好？
phrases.tip: GPS / sat nav，很多人直接用 Google Maps

phrases.en: There are already some scratches here and a dent on the bumper.
phrases.zh: 這裡本來就有一些刮痕，保險桿上還有一個凹痕。
phrases.tip: 取車先繞一圈檢查，dent 凹痕 / scratch 刮痕

phrases.en: Let me take a few photos of the car before I drive off, just in case.
phrases.zh: 我先拍幾張車子的照片再開走，以防萬一。
phrases.tip: 拍照存證超重要，避免還車被賴

phrases.en: Is there a mileage limit, or is it unlimited mileage?
phrases.zh: 有里程限制嗎？還是里程數不限？
phrases.tip: 里程 mileage，unlimited mileage 里程無限

phrases.en: Do I need to return it with a full tank of gas?
phrases.zh: 還車的時候需要把油加滿嗎？
phrases.tip: full tank 滿油；full-to-full 借滿還滿最划算

phrases.en: Where exactly do I drop off the car, and what time do I need to return it by?
phrases.zh: 還車要停在哪裡？最晚要幾點還？
phrases.tip: 取車 pick up / 還車 drop off (return)

phrases.en: The warning light on the dashboard came on. Is that a problem?
phrases.zh: 儀表板上的警示燈亮了，這樣有問題嗎？
phrases.tip: warning light 警示燈；不確定就打租車公司電話

lines.en: Good afternoon! Do you have a reservation with us?
lines.zh: 午安！請問您有跟我們預約嗎？

lines.en: Yes, it's under the name Chen. Here's my passport and international driving permit.
lines.zh: 有的，訂位人是 Chen。這是我的護照和國際駕照。

lines.en: Great, I found your booking. You reserved a compact automatic, correct?
lines.zh: 好的，找到您的訂單了。您預訂的是小型自排車，對嗎？

lines.en: That's right. Does the rate already include full insurance?
lines.zh: 沒錯。這個價錢有含全險了嗎？

lines.en: It includes basic coverage. For an extra 15 dollars a day, you can add full CDW with zero excess.
lines.zh: 有含基本險。每天多加 15 美金，就能升級成零自負額的全險。

lines.en: Let's add the full coverage. Could I also get a child seat for a four-year-old?
lines.zh: 那幫我加全險。另外可以加一張四歲小孩用的兒童座椅嗎？

lines.en: No problem, I'll add one. We'll hold a 200-dollar deposit on your credit card.
lines.zh: 沒問題，我幫您加一張。我們會在您信用卡上預刷 200 美金押金。

lines.en: Okay. I noticed some scratches on the door earlier. Can we mark those down?
lines.zh: 好的。我剛剛看到車門上有一些刮痕，可以先登記起來嗎？

lines.en: Of course. I'll note the existing damage, and feel free to take photos too.
lines.zh: 當然，我會把原有的損傷記下來，您也可以自己拍照存證。

lines.en: Perfect. And do I return it with a full tank?
lines.zh: 太好了。還車時要加滿油嗎？

lines.en: Yes, please bring it back full and drop it off at the same lot by 6 p.m.
lines.zh: 是的，請加滿油，並在晚上六點前還到同一個停車場。

lines.en: Got it. Thanks for your help!
lines.zh: 了解，謝謝你的幫忙！

phrases.en: Excuse me, which grade of gas does this car take, regular or premium?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，這台車要加幾號油？普通還是高級的？
phrases.tip: 美式 regular/premium；英式 unleaded/petrol

phrases.en: Fill it up, please. And how much is it per liter today?
phrases.zh: 麻煩幫我加滿，今天一公升多少錢？
phrases.tip: 加滿 fill it up / fill her up

phrases.en: Sorry, how do I open the fuel cap on this car?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，這台車的油箱蓋要怎麼打開？
phrases.tip: 油箱蓋 fuel cap / fuel door

phrases.en: Is this a self-service station? How do I pay at the pump?
phrases.zh: 這是自助加油站嗎？要怎麼在加油機付款？
phrases.tip: self-service 自助；full-service 有人服務

phrases.en: The pump won't take my card. Can I pay inside instead?
phrases.zh: 加油機刷不了我的卡，我可以進去店裡付嗎？
phrases.tip: pay inside / pay at the kiosk 到店內結帳

phrases.en: Do I need to prepay first, or do I pump the gas and then pay?
phrases.zh: 我要先預付嗎？還是先加油再付錢？
phrases.tip: 美國很多站要 prepay 先付

phrases.en: Does this rental car have an ETC or a toll transponder for the highway?
phrases.zh: 這台租來的車有 ETC 或高速公路的收費感應器嗎？
phrases.tip: toll transponder 感應器；台灣叫 eTag

phrases.en: How do I pay the toll here, with cash, card, or the transponder?
phrases.zh: 這裡的過路費要怎麼付？現金、刷卡還是用感應器？
phrases.tip: toll 過路費；toll booth 收費站

phrases.en: I think I went through the toll without paying. How can I settle it later?
phrases.zh: 我好像沒付錢就過收費站了，之後要怎麼補繳？
phrases.tip: settle / pay online 事後補繳

phrases.en: Excuse me, is there a parking lot nearby? I can't find a spot.
phrases.zh: 不好意思，附近有停車場嗎？我找不到車位。
phrases.tip: parking lot (美) / car park (英)；spot 車位

phrases.en: How much is parking per hour, and do I pay at the machine?
phrases.zh: 停車一小時多少錢？是在繳費機付款嗎？
phrases.tip: pay station / meter 繳費機

phrases.en: Am I allowed to park here, or is this a no-parking zone?
phrases.zh: 這裡可以停車嗎？還是這是禁止停車區？
phrases.tip: no-parking zone 禁停區；避免被拖吊

phrases.en: Oh no, I think I got a parking ticket. Where do I pay the fine?
phrases.zh: 糟糕，我好像被開了違停罰單，罰款要去哪裡繳？
phrases.tip: parking ticket 違停單；fine 罰款

phrases.en: Is it okay to leave the car here for ten minutes to drop someone off?
phrases.zh: 在這裡停十分鐘讓人下車可以嗎？
phrases.tip: drop someone off 讓人下車；loading zone 臨停區

phrases.en: The car is making a strange noise. Is there a garage around here?
phrases.zh: 車子發出怪聲音，這附近有修車廠嗎？
phrases.tip: garage / mechanic 修車廠

dialogue.title: 在自助加油站加油並詢問付款

lines.en: Hi, is this a self-service station?
lines.zh: 你好，這裡是自助加油嗎？

lines.en: Yes, it is. Pick a pump, and you can pay by card right there or come pay inside.
lines.zh: 是的。您選一個加油機，可以直接刷卡，或進來店裡付都行。

lines.en: Got it. This is a rental car, so I'm not sure which grade it takes.
lines.zh: 了解。這是租來的車，我不太確定要加幾號油。

lines.en: Most rentals take regular unleaded. Check the label inside the fuel door to be sure.
lines.zh: 大部分租車加普通無鉛就好，您可以看油箱蓋內側的標籤確認。

lines.en: Thanks. Actually, how do I open the fuel cap? I can't find the button.
lines.zh: 謝謝。對了，油箱蓋要怎麼開？我找不到按鈕。

lines.en: There's usually a lever down by the driver's seat, or just push the fuel door in.
lines.zh: 駕駛座旁邊通常有個拉桿，不然直接壓一下油箱蓋也會彈開。

lines.en: Found it, thanks. My card got declined at the pump, though.
lines.zh: 找到了，謝謝。不過我的卡在加油機刷不過。

lines.en: No worries. Pump first, then come inside and pay at the counter.
lines.zh: 沒關係，您先加油，加完再進來櫃台付就好。

lines.en: Okay. I'd like to fill it up. Do you have a restroom I can use?
lines.zh: 好，我要加滿。你們有洗手間可以借用嗎？

lines.en: Sure, it's around the side, and here's the key. Just bring it back when you're done.
lines.zh: 有的，在側邊，這是鑰匙，用完拿回來給我就行。

lines.en: Great. By the way, is there parking near the old town? I couldn't find any earlier.
lines.zh: 太好了。順便問一下，舊城區附近有停車場嗎？我剛剛都找不到。

lines.en: There's a paid lot two blocks past the church. It's usually the easiest place to find a spot.
lines.zh: 過教堂再兩個路口有個收費停車場，那邊通常最好找位子。

title: 問路導航
desc: 問路、看地圖、找廁所、找地標

phrases.en: Excuse me, could you tell me how to get to the train station?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，可以告訴我怎麼去火車站嗎？
phrases.tip: 禮貌開頭 Excuse me / Sorry to bother you

phrases.en: I'm a little lost. Where am I on this map right now?
phrases.zh: 我有點迷路了，我現在在地圖上的哪裡？
phrases.tip: I'm lost 我迷路了；很實用的救命句

phrases.en: Is it within walking distance, or should I take the bus?
phrases.zh: 走路到得了嗎？還是我該搭公車？
phrases.tip: within walking distance 走路可到

phrases.en: How long does it take to walk there from here?
phrases.zh: 從這裡走過去要多久？
phrases.tip: 回答常是 about ten minutes

phrases.en: Should I go straight, or do I need to turn somewhere?
phrases.zh: 我要直走嗎？還是要在哪裡轉彎？
phrases.tip: go straight 直走；turn left/right 左右轉

phrases.en: So I turn left at the second traffic light, is that right?
phrases.zh: 所以我在第二個紅綠燈左轉，對嗎？
phrases.tip: traffic light 紅綠燈；複誦確認很重要

phrases.en: Is it on this side of the street or the other side?
phrases.zh: 它在這一側，還是馬路的對面？
phrases.tip: across the street 對街；on your right 在右手邊

phrases.en: Excuse me, where's the nearest restroom?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，最近的廁所在哪裡？
phrases.tip: restroom (美) / toilet (英) / washroom

phrases.en: Do I need to buy something to use the toilet here?
phrases.zh: 在這裡用廁所需要先消費嗎？
phrases.tip: 有些店廁所要消費或密碼

phrases.en: I'm looking for this landmark. Am I heading the right way?
phrases.zh: 我在找這個地標，我走的方向對嗎？
phrases.tip: landmark 地標；heading the right way 方向對

phrases.en: Could you show me on my phone map where it is?
phrases.zh: 你可以在我的手機地圖上指給我看它在哪裡嗎？
phrases.tip: 直接把手機遞過去最快

phrases.en: Which exit should I take to get to the museum?
phrases.zh: 我要走哪個出口才能到博物館？
phrases.tip: 捷運/地鐵 exit 出口編號很重要

phrases.en: Is there a shortcut, or is this the fastest way?
phrases.zh: 有沒有捷徑？還是這就是最快的路？
phrases.tip: shortcut 捷徑；the fastest way 最快的路

phrases.en: Sorry, could you say that again a bit more slowly?
phrases.zh: 抱歉，可以再說一次，慢一點嗎？
phrases.tip: 聽不懂就請對方放慢，很正常

phrases.en: Thanks so much for your help. Have a great day!
phrases.zh: 非常謝謝你的幫忙，祝你有美好的一天！
phrases.tip: 問完路道謝，禮貌收尾

dialogue.title: 在街上向路人問路找博物館和廁所

lines.en: Excuse me, sorry to bother you. Could you help me find the city museum?
lines.zh: 不好意思，打擾一下，可以幫我找市立博物館嗎？

lines.en: Of course! It's not far. Are you walking or driving?
lines.zh: 當然可以！其實不遠。您是走路還是開車？

lines.en: Walking. Is it within walking distance from here?
lines.zh: 走路。從這裡走過去會到嗎？

lines.en: Yes, about ten minutes. Go straight down this street and turn left at the second light.
lines.zh: 會，大概十分鐘。沿這條街直走，在第二個紅綠燈左轉。

lines.en: Turn left at the second traffic light. Then is it on this side of the street?
lines.zh: 第二個紅綠燈左轉。那它在這一側嗎？

lines.en: It'll be across the street, a big stone building. You can't miss it.
lines.zh: 在對街，是一棟很大的石造建築，你一定看得到。

lines.en: Perfect. Could you show me on my phone map, just to be sure?
lines.zh: 太好了。可以在我手機地圖上指一下嗎？想確認一下。

lines.en: Sure, here. You're right here, and the museum is this spot.
lines.zh: 好啊，來。你在這裡，博物館在這個點。

lines.en: Thank you! One more thing, where's the nearest restroom?
lines.zh: 謝謝你！還有一件事，最近的廁所在哪裡？

lines.en: There's a public one in the park on your way, right before the museum.
lines.zh: 你會經過的公園裡有一間公廁，就在博物館前面。

lines.en: That's so helpful. Do I need to pay to use it?
lines.zh: 太有幫助了。用那個廁所要付錢嗎？

lines.en: No, it's free. Enjoy the museum, and have a great day!
lines.zh: 不用，是免費的。好好逛博物館，祝你有美好的一天！

title: 飯店入住
desc: 入住、退房、寄放行李、早餐

phrases.en: Hi, I have a reservation under the name Chen.
phrases.zh: 你好，我有訂房，是登記在 Chen 的名下。
phrases.tip: 把 Chen 換成你的姓；也可說 booked under…

phrases.en: We booked a family room for three nights.
phrases.zh: 我們訂了一間家庭房，住三個晚上。
phrases.tip: double room 雙人房／twin room 兩張單人床

phrases.en: Here's my passport and the booking confirmation.
phrases.zh: 這是我的護照和訂房確認單。
phrases.tip: confirmation email 也可以直接出示手機

phrases.en: Is it possible to check in early? Our flight landed this morning.
phrases.zh: 可以提早入住嗎？我們的班機今天早上就到了。
phrases.tip: check in early = 提早入住

phrases.en: If the room isn't ready, could we leave our bags here for now?
phrases.zh: 如果房間還沒好，我們可以先把行李寄放在這裡嗎？
phrases.tip: leave / store our luggage 都可以

phrases.en: Could we have a room on a high floor, please?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我們安排高樓層的房間嗎？
phrases.tip: 換成 a quiet room / away from the elevator

phrases.en: We'd prefer a quiet room, away from the street if possible.
phrases.zh: 如果可以的話，我們希望要安靜、不靠馬路的房間。
phrases.tip: away from the street = 不靠馬路那側

phrases.en: What time is breakfast, and where is it served?
phrases.zh: 早餐是幾點？在哪裡用餐？
phrases.tip: is breakfast included? 早餐有含嗎

phrases.en: Is breakfast included in the room rate?
phrases.zh: 早餐有含在房價裡嗎？
phrases.tip: room rate = 房價

phrases.en: What time do we need to check out tomorrow?
phrases.zh: 我們明天要幾點退房？
phrases.tip: check-out time 通常是 11 點或中午

phrases.en: Could we get a late check-out? Our flight isn't until the evening.
phrases.zh: 可以晚一點退房嗎？我們的班機是晚上才飛。
phrases.tip: late check-out 常需加價或看空房

phrases.en: We've already checked out. Can we store our luggage until 4 p.m.?
phrases.zh: 我們已經退房了，可以把行李寄放到下午四點嗎？
phrases.tip: 退房後寄放行李很常見，通常免費

phrases.en: Do you need a deposit or a credit card for incidentals?
phrases.zh: 需要押金或信用卡預刷雜費嗎？
phrases.tip: deposit 押金／incidentals 雜費

phrases.en: Could I have two key cards, please?
phrases.zh: 可以給我兩張房卡嗎？
phrases.tip: key card = 房卡（門卡）

lines.en: Good afternoon! Welcome. How can I help you?
lines.zh: 午安，歡迎光臨！有什麼可以為您服務的嗎？

lines.en: Hi, we have a reservation under the name Chen, for a family room.
lines.zh: 你好，我們有訂房，登記在 Chen 的名下，是一間家庭房。

lines.en: Let me check. Yes, three nights with breakfast. May I see your passport?
lines.zh: 我查一下。有的，三晚含早餐。可以看一下您的護照嗎？

lines.en: Sure, here you go. It's a bit early. Is our room ready yet?
lines.zh: 當然，給你。現在有點早，我們的房間好了嗎？

lines.en: I'm afraid it won't be ready until 3 p.m. Would you like to leave your bags with us?
lines.zh: 恐怕要到下午三點才會好。您要先把行李寄放在我們這裡嗎？

lines.en: Yes, please. Also, could we have a quiet room on a high floor?
lines.zh: 好的，麻煩了。另外，可以給我們高樓層、比較安靜的房間嗎？

lines.en: Of course. I've noted a high floor away from the elevator.
lines.zh: 沒問題，我已經幫您註記高樓層、遠離電梯的房間。

lines.en: Great. What time is breakfast served?
lines.zh: 太好了。早餐是幾點供應？

lines.en: From 7 to 10 a.m. in the restaurant on the second floor.
lines.zh: 早上七點到十點，在二樓餐廳。

lines.en: Perfect. And check-out is at eleven?
lines.zh: 太好了。退房是十一點嗎？

lines.en: That's right. Here are your two key cards. Enjoy your stay!
lines.zh: 沒錯。這是您的兩張房卡，祝您住得愉快！

lines.en: Thank you so much!
lines.zh: 非常謝謝你！

title: 客房與服務
desc: 客房要求、故障報修、加床、叫醒服務

phrases.en: Hi, this is room 812. The air conditioning isn't working.
phrases.zh: 你好，這裡是 812 房，冷氣壞了。
phrases.tip: 換 the heater 暖氣／the TV 電視

phrases.en: There's no hot water in the shower. Could someone take a look?
phrases.zh: 浴室沒有熱水，可以請人來看一下嗎？
phrases.tip: take a look = 來看看／檢查

phrases.en: The toilet won't flush. Could you send someone up?
phrases.zh: 馬桶沖不了水，可以請人上來嗎？
phrases.tip: won't flush = 沖不下去

phrases.en: Could we get some extra towels, please?
phrases.zh: 可以再給我們一些毛巾嗎？
phrases.tip: extra pillows 多的枕頭／a blanket 毯子

phrases.en: Could we have two more pillows and a blanket?
phrases.zh: 可以再給我們兩顆枕頭和一條毯子嗎？
phrases.tip: one more = 再一個

phrases.en: What's the Wi-Fi password for the room?
phrases.zh: 房間的 Wi-Fi 密碼是多少？
phrases.tip: network name 網路名稱（SSID）

phrases.en: The Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting. Is there anything you can do?
phrases.zh: Wi-Fi 一直斷線，你們有辦法處理嗎？
phrases.tip: keeps disconnecting = 一直斷

phrases.en: Could we add an extra bed for our child?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我們的小孩加一張床嗎？
phrases.tip: extra bed 加床／crib 嬰兒床

phrases.en: Is there a charge for the extra bed?
phrases.zh: 加床要另外收費嗎？
phrases.tip: Is it free? 免費嗎

phrases.en: Could we have a wake-up call at six thirty tomorrow morning?
phrases.zh: 明天早上六點半可以幫我們設個叫醒服務嗎？
phrases.tip: wake-up call = 電話叫醒

phrases.en: Could you send up some drinking water, please?
phrases.zh: 可以送一些飲用水上來嗎？
phrases.tip: bottled water 瓶裝水

phrases.en: What time do we need to check out, and can we get a late check-out?
phrases.zh: 我們要幾點退房？可以晚點退房嗎？
phrases.tip: late check-out = 延遲退房

phrases.en: The room next door is really noisy. Could you help?
phrases.zh: 隔壁房間很吵，可以幫忙處理一下嗎？
phrases.tip: noisy = 吵；也可說 loud

phrases.en: Could someone come and clean the room while we're out?
phrases.zh: 我們外出時可以請人來打掃房間嗎？
phrases.tip: housekeeping = 房務清潔

dialogue.title: 打電話到櫃檯反映問題

lines.en: Front desk, good evening. How may I help you?
lines.zh: 櫃檯您好，晚安，有什麼可以為您服務的嗎？

lines.en: Hi, this is room 812. The air conditioning isn't cooling at all.
lines.zh: 你好，這裡是 812 房，冷氣完全不冷。

lines.en: I'm so sorry about that. I'll send a technician right away.
lines.zh: 非常抱歉，我馬上派技術人員過去。

lines.en: Thank you. Also, there's no hot water in the shower.
lines.zh: 謝謝。另外，浴室也沒有熱水。

lines.en: I'll have him check that too. Is there anything else you need?
lines.zh: 我會請他一併檢查。還有其他需要嗎？

lines.en: Yes, could we get two extra towels and one more pillow?
lines.zh: 有的，可以再給我們兩條毛巾和一顆枕頭嗎？

lines.en: Certainly. And what's your room number again?
lines.zh: 當然可以。再請問一次您的房號？

lines.en: Room 812. Oh, and could we add an extra bed for our son?
lines.zh: 812 房。對了，可以幫我兒子加一張床嗎？

lines.en: Of course. The extra bed is free of charge for children.
lines.zh: 沒問題，兒童加床是免費的。

lines.en: Great. One last thing—a wake-up call at six thirty tomorrow, please.
lines.zh: 太好了。最後一件事，明天早上六點半麻煩幫我們叫醒。

lines.en: Noted—6:30 a.m. Everything will be taken care of shortly.
lines.zh: 記下了，早上六點半。所有事情很快都會處理好。

lines.en: Thank you so much for your help.
lines.zh: 真的很謝謝你的幫忙。

title: 大眾運輸
desc: 買票、地鐵公車、轉乘、班次

phrases.en: Two tickets to Central Station, please.
phrases.zh: 兩張到中央車站的票，謝謝。
phrases.tip: 把 Central Station 換成你的目的地

phrases.en: How much is a one-way ticket to the airport?
phrases.zh: 到機場的單程票多少錢？
phrases.tip: one-way 單程／round-trip 來回

phrases.en: Is there a day pass for the whole family?
phrases.zh: 有全家可以用的一日票嗎？
phrases.tip: day pass 一日票／group ticket 團體票

phrases.en: Where can I buy tickets—at the machine or the counter?
phrases.zh: 我要在哪裡買票？售票機還是櫃檯？
phrases.tip: ticket machine 售票機

phrases.en: Does this train go to the Old Town?
phrases.zh: 這班車有到舊城區嗎？
phrases.tip: 換 this bus 這班公車

phrases.en: Which platform does the train to the airport leave from?
phrases.zh: 往機場的車是從哪個月台出發？
phrases.tip: platform 月台

phrases.en: Do I need to change trains, or is it a direct line?
phrases.zh: 我需要轉車嗎，還是這條線直達？
phrases.tip: change trains 轉車／direct 直達

phrases.en: Where do I transfer to the blue line?
phrases.zh: 我要在哪裡轉搭藍線？
phrases.tip: transfer = 轉乘／換線

phrases.en: Excuse me, which stop should I get off at for the museum?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，要去博物館我該在哪一站下車？
phrases.tip: get off 下車／stop 站

phrases.en: How many stops is it to the harbor?
phrases.zh: 到港口還有幾站？
phrases.tip: stops = 站數

phrases.en: How often do the buses come?
phrases.zh: 公車多久來一班？
phrases.tip: How often = 多久一班

phrases.en: What time is the last train tonight?
phrases.zh: 今晚的末班車是幾點？
phrases.tip: last train 末班車／first train 首班車

phrases.en: Does this card work on both the metro and the buses?
phrases.zh: 這張卡地鐵和公車都能用嗎？
phrases.tip: 類似悠遊卡的交通卡

phrases.en: Could you tell me when we reach my stop?
phrases.zh: 到我那一站時可以跟我說一聲嗎？
phrases.tip: 請司機或乘客提醒你下車

lines.en: Hi, we'd like to go to the Old Town. Two adults and two kids.
lines.zh: 你好，我們想去舊城區，兩個大人、兩個小孩。

lines.en: Sure. Are you planning to travel around all day?
lines.zh: 好的，你們打算一整天都在市區移動嗎？

lines.en: Yes, we'll be sightseeing the whole day. Is there a day pass?
lines.zh: 對，我們一整天都會觀光。有一日票嗎？

lines.en: There is. A family day pass covers all metro and bus lines.
lines.zh: 有的，家庭一日票地鐵和公車路線都可以搭。

lines.en: Great, we'll take one. Does the metro go directly to the Old Town?
lines.zh: 太好了，我們買一張。地鐵有直達舊城區嗎？

lines.en: Almost. Take the red line, then transfer to the blue line at City Hall.
lines.zh: 差不多，搭紅線，然後在市政廳站轉搭藍線。

lines.en: Which platform is the red line?
lines.zh: 紅線在哪個月台？

lines.en: Platform 2, just down the stairs on your right.
lines.zh: 第二月台，下樓梯右手邊就是。

lines.en: And how many stops until we transfer?
lines.zh: 到轉車那站還有幾站？

lines.en: Four stops to City Hall, then two more on the blue line.
lines.zh: 到市政廳四站，再搭藍線兩站。

lines.en: Perfect. One more thing—what time is the last train back?
lines.zh: 太好了。還有一件事，回程的末班車是幾點？

lines.en: Around midnight. Enjoy your day in the Old Town!
lines.zh: 大約午夜。祝你們在舊城區玩得愉快！

title: 餐廳點餐
desc: 訂位、點餐、過敏、結帳、給小費

phrases.en: Hi, do you have a table for two?
phrases.zh: 你好，有兩位的座位嗎？
phrases.tip: 人數換數字即可，例如 for four。

phrases.en: I have a reservation under the name Lin.
phrases.zh: 我有訂位，用林這個名字訂的。
phrases.tip: reservation 是「訂位」，under the name 指用誰的名字。

phrases.en: Could we sit by the window, please?
phrases.zh: 可以坐窗邊嗎？
phrases.tip: 換位子可說 sit outside（坐外面）。

phrases.en: How long is the wait?
phrases.zh: 大概要等多久？

phrases.en: Could I see the menu, please?
phrases.zh: 可以給我看一下菜單嗎？

phrases.en: What do you recommend?
phrases.zh: 你推薦什麼？
phrases.tip: 問招牌菜可說 What's your signature dish?

phrases.en: What's the house specialty here?
phrases.zh: 你們這裡的招牌菜是什麼？

phrases.en: I'll have the grilled chicken, please.
phrases.zh: 我要烤雞，謝謝。
phrases.tip: I'll have… 是點餐最常用的說法。

phrases.en: Is this dish spicy?
phrases.zh: 這道菜會辣嗎？
phrases.tip: 不要辣可說 Not spicy, please.

phrases.en: I'm allergic to peanuts. Does this contain any?
phrases.zh: 我對花生過敏，這道菜裡面有嗎？
phrases.tip: allergic to 就是「對…過敏」，最重要的救命句。

phrases.en: I'm vegetarian. Do you have any meat-free options?
phrases.zh: 我吃素，有沒有不含肉的餐點？
phrases.tip: meat-free＝不含肉；純素可說 vegan。

phrases.en: Could I get a glass of water, please?
phrases.zh: 可以給我一杯水嗎？
phrases.tip: 要冰水說 ice water；要溫水說 warm water。

phrases.en: Excuse me, this isn't what I ordered.
phrases.zh: 不好意思，這不是我點的。

phrases.en: Could we get some more napkins?
phrases.zh: 可以再給我們一些餐巾紙嗎？

phrases.en: Could we have the check, please?
phrases.zh: 可以買單嗎？
phrases.tip: 美式 check＝英式 bill，兩個都通。

phrases.en: Can we pay separately?
phrases.zh: 我們可以分開付嗎？
phrases.tip: 一起付說 We'll pay together.

phrases.en: Do you take credit cards?
phrases.zh: 你們可以刷卡嗎？
phrases.tip: 問能不能刷卡的標準說法。

phrases.en: Is the tip included?
phrases.zh: 小費有含在裡面嗎？
phrases.tip: tip 是小費，美國餐廳通常給 15-20%。

phrases.en: Keep the change.
phrases.zh: 不用找了。
phrases.tip: 把零錢當小費留下的常用說法。

phrases.en: Could I get this to go, please?
phrases.zh: 這個可以幫我打包嗎？
phrases.tip: 美式 to go＝英式 takeaway，都是外帶/打包。

lines.en: Hi there! Welcome. How many in your party?
lines.zh: 嗨，歡迎光臨！請問幾位？

lines.en: A table for four, please. Could we sit by the window?
lines.zh: 四位，謝謝。可以坐窗邊嗎？

lines.en: Of course. Right this way. Here are your menus.
lines.zh: 當然可以，這邊請。這是你們的菜單。

lines.en: Thanks. What do you recommend?
lines.zh: 謝謝。你推薦什麼？

lines.en: Our grilled salmon is very popular, and so is the beef pasta.
lines.zh: 我們的烤鮭魚很受歡迎，牛肉義大利麵也是。

lines.en: Sounds good. But my son is allergic to peanuts. Does the pasta contain any?
lines.zh: 聽起來不錯。不過我兒子對花生過敏，義大利麵裡有花生嗎？

lines.en: No peanuts at all. I'll let the kitchen know to be careful.
lines.zh: 完全沒有花生。我會提醒廚房特別注意。

lines.en: Great. We'll have two salmon and two pasta, and a glass of water for everyone.
lines.zh: 太好了。那我們要兩份鮭魚、兩份義大利麵，每個人再一杯水。

lines.en: Perfect. I'll bring that right out.
lines.zh: 沒問題，我馬上為你們送來。

lines.en: Excuse me, could we have the check? Can we pay by credit card?
lines.zh: 不好意思，可以買單嗎？可以刷卡嗎？

lines.en: Absolutely. Was everything okay tonight?
lines.zh: 當然可以。今晚一切都還滿意嗎？

lines.en: Everything was great, thank you. Keep the change.
lines.zh: 都很棒，謝謝你。不用找了。

title: 咖啡速食
desc: 點飲料、外帶、客製化、速食店

phrases.en: Can I get a medium latte, please?
phrases.zh: 我要一杯中杯拿鐵，謝謝。
phrases.tip: 杯型：small 小 / medium 中 / large 大。

phrases.en: Iced, please. No ice, actually — sorry, hot.
phrases.zh: 冰的，謝謝。啊不對，去冰…抱歉，我要熱的。
phrases.tip: 去冰 no ice；少冰 light ice；正常冰 regular ice。

phrases.en: Could I have less sugar?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我少糖嗎？
phrases.tip: 半糖 half sugar；無糖 no sugar。

phrases.en: Can I add an extra shot of espresso?
phrases.zh: 可以多加一份濃縮咖啡嗎？
phrases.tip: extra shot＝多一份濃縮，會更濃更提神。

phrases.en: Do you have oat milk?
phrases.zh: 你們有燕麥奶嗎？
phrases.tip: 常見替代奶：oat 燕麥、soy 豆、almond 杏仁。

phrases.en: Is this for here or to go?
phrases.zh: （店員問）內用還是外帶？
phrases.tip: for here＝內用，to go＝外帶，這是店員最常問你的一句。

phrases.en: For here, please.
phrases.zh: 內用，謝謝。
phrases.tip: 回答內用就說 for here。

phrases.en: To go, please.
phrases.zh: 外帶，謝謝。
phrases.tip: 英式常說 takeaway，意思一樣。

phrases.en: Could I get a cup holder and a couple of napkins?
phrases.zh: 可以給我一個杯架和幾張餐巾紙嗎？

phrases.en: I'll have the number two meal, please.
phrases.zh: 我要二號餐，謝謝。
phrases.tip: 速食店餐點常用號碼點，最快最省事。

phrases.en: Can I make it a large, please?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我加大嗎？
phrases.tip: 加大套餐 make it large／supersize（美式口語）。

phrases.en: No onions on the burger, please.
phrases.zh: 漢堡不要加洋蔥，謝謝。
phrases.tip: 去掉某料：No + 食材；例如 no pickles 不要酸黃瓜。

phrases.en: Could I have extra ketchup on the side?
phrases.zh: 可以另外多給我一些番茄醬嗎？
phrases.tip: on the side＝醬料另外附，不要淋上去。

phrases.en: Can I swap the fries for a salad?
phrases.zh: 可以把薯條換成沙拉嗎？
phrases.tip: swap A for B＝把 A 換成 B。

phrases.en: Are free refills available?
phrases.zh: 飲料可以免費續杯嗎？
phrases.tip: refill＝續杯，美國速食店汽水常可免費續。

phrases.en: Could I get a receipt, please?
phrases.zh: 可以給我收據嗎？

phrases.en: How long is the wait for the order?
phrases.zh: 餐點大概要等多久？

phrases.en: Sorry, I think you gave me the wrong drink.
phrases.zh: 不好意思，我想你給錯飲料了。

lines.en: Hi! What can I get for you?
lines.zh: 嗨！請問要點什麼？

lines.en: Can I get a medium latte, iced, with less sugar?
lines.zh: 我要一杯中杯拿鐵，冰的，少糖。

lines.en: Sure. Any milk preference? We have oat and soy.
lines.zh: 好的。牛奶有偏好嗎？我們有燕麥奶和豆奶。

lines.en: Oat milk, please. And can I add an extra shot?
lines.zh: 燕麥奶，謝謝。可以再多加一份濃縮嗎？

lines.en: You got it. Is this for here or to go?
lines.zh: 沒問題。內用還是外帶？

lines.en: To go, please. Could I get a cup holder too?
lines.zh: 外帶，謝謝。可以順便給我一個杯架嗎？

lines.en: Of course. Anything else?
lines.zh: 當然可以。還需要別的嗎？

lines.en: That's all. How long is the wait?
lines.zh: 這樣就好。大概要等多久？

lines.en: Just a couple of minutes. That'll be five fifty.
lines.zh: 只要幾分鐘。總共五塊五。

lines.en: Here you go. Could I get a receipt, please?
lines.zh: 錢在這，可以給我收據嗎？

lines.en: Here's your receipt. I'll call your name when it's ready.
lines.zh: 這是你的收據，好了我會叫你的名字。

lines.en: Thank you so much!
lines.zh: 非常感謝！

title: 計程車Uber
desc: 叫車、告知目的地、跳表、下車

phrases.en: Could you call a taxi for us, please?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我們叫一台計程車嗎？
phrases.tip: 在飯店櫃檯常用這句請人代叫。

phrases.en: Are you free? We're going to the airport.
phrases.zh: 有空嗎？我們要去機場。
phrases.tip: 路邊攔車先確認對方 available。

phrases.en: Hi, are you the Uber for Lin?
phrases.zh: 你好，你是林叫的 Uber 嗎？
phrases.tip: 上 Uber 前先核對名字，較安全。

phrases.en: Could you take us to this address?
phrases.zh: 可以載我們到這個地址嗎？
phrases.tip: 直接把手機地址給司機看最保險。

phrases.en: We'd like to go to the Grand Hotel, please.
phrases.zh: 我們要去圓山大飯店，謝謝。

phrases.en: It's on the corner of Fifth and Main.
phrases.zh: 就在第五街和大街的轉角。
phrases.tip: on the corner of A and B＝在 A 街和 B 街的轉角。

phrases.en: About how much will it cost?
phrases.zh: 大約要多少錢？
phrases.tip: 上車前先問價，避免爭議。

phrases.en: Do you use the meter?
phrases.zh: 你有跳表嗎？
phrases.tip: meter＝計程表；沒跳表可能是喊價，要小心。

phrases.en: Is there an extra charge for luggage?
phrases.zh: 行李要另外加錢嗎？

phrases.en: Could you take the highway? We're in a bit of a hurry.
phrases.zh: 可以走高速公路嗎？我們有點趕。
phrases.tip: 英式高速公路叫 motorway。

phrases.en: Could you avoid the traffic if possible?
phrases.zh: 可以的話盡量避開塞車好嗎？

phrases.en: Is it okay if we make a quick stop?
phrases.zh: 可以中途稍微停一下嗎？

phrases.en: Could you slow down a little, please?
phrases.zh: 可以請你開慢一點嗎？
phrases.tip: 覺得太快時禮貌提醒司機。

phrases.en: You can just stop here, thanks.
phrases.zh: 在這裡停就好，謝謝。
phrases.tip: 下車前一段先講，讓司機有時間靠邊。

phrases.en: Could you pull over up ahead?
phrases.zh: 可以在前面靠邊停嗎？
phrases.tip: pull over＝靠邊停車。

phrases.en: How much do I owe you?
phrases.zh: 我要付你多少錢？

phrases.en: Keep the change, thanks for the ride.
phrases.zh: 不用找了，謝謝載我們。
phrases.tip: 在美國搭計程車通常也會給一點小費。

phrases.en: Could I get a receipt, please?
phrases.zh: 可以給我收據嗎？
phrases.tip: 報帳或核對車資都用得到。

lines.en: Hello! Where are you headed today?
lines.zh: 你好！今天要去哪裡？

lines.en: Hi, could you take us to this address? It's the art museum.
lines.zh: 你好，可以載我們到這個地址嗎？是美術館。

lines.en: Sure thing. Hop in. That's about twenty minutes away.
lines.zh: 沒問題，上車吧。大概二十分鐘的路程。

lines.en: About how much will it cost?
lines.zh: 大約要多少錢？

lines.en: It runs on the meter, probably around fifteen dollars.
lines.zh: 都是跳表計費，大概十五塊左右。

lines.en: Okay. Could you take the highway? We're in a bit of a hurry.
lines.zh: 好的。可以走高速公路嗎？我們有點趕。

lines.en: No problem, the highway is faster this time of day.
lines.zh: 沒問題，這個時段走高速比較快。

lines.en: Great, thanks. Is there an extra charge for the luggage?
lines.zh: 太好了，謝謝。行李要另外加錢嗎？

lines.en: No extra charge. We're almost there — which entrance?
lines.zh: 不用另外加。快到了，你們要在哪個入口？

lines.en: You can just stop here, thanks. How much do I owe you?
lines.zh: 在這裡停就好，謝謝。我要付你多少錢？

lines.en: That'll be fourteen fifty.
lines.zh: 總共十四塊五。

lines.en: Here's fifteen — keep the change. Could I get a receipt, please?
lines.zh: 給你十五塊，不用找了。可以給我收據嗎？

title: 購物退稅
desc: 詢價、試穿、尺寸、結帳、退稅

phrases.en: How much is this?
phrases.zh: 這個多少錢？
phrases.tip: 也可說 What's the price of this?

phrases.en: I'm just looking, thanks.
phrases.zh: 我只是看看，謝謝。
phrases.tip: 店員問要不要幫忙時的禮貌回應

phrases.en: Do you have this in a bigger size?
phrases.zh: 這個有大一號的嗎？
phrases.tip: 小一號用 smaller size

phrases.en: Can I try this on?
phrases.zh: 我可以試穿這件嗎？
phrases.tip: 試穿必備句

phrases.en: Where is the fitting room?
phrases.zh: 試衣間在哪裡？
phrases.tip: fitting room = 試衣間，英式常說 changing room

phrases.en: Do you have this in another color?
phrases.zh: 這個有其他顏色嗎？
phrases.tip: 指定顏色可說 Do you have it in black?

phrases.en: It's a bit too tight. Do you have a size up?
phrases.zh: 有點太緊了，有大一號的嗎？
phrases.tip: too loose = 太鬆

phrases.en: Can I pay by card?
phrases.zh: 可以刷卡嗎？
phrases.tip: 付現說 I'll pay in cash.

phrases.en: Is this on sale?
phrases.zh: 這個有打折嗎？
phrases.tip: 詢問折扣 Is there any discount?

phrases.en: Can I get a tax refund?
phrases.zh: 我可以退稅嗎？
phrases.tip: tax refund = 退稅

phrases.en: Could you fill out the tax refund form for me?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我辦退稅表嗎？
phrases.tip: tax refund form = 退稅表

phrases.en: How much do I need to spend to qualify for the refund?
phrases.zh: 要消費多少才能退稅？
phrases.tip: 詢問退稅門檻

phrases.en: Can I have a bag, please?
phrases.zh: 可以給我一個袋子嗎？
phrases.tip: 有些國家袋子要收費

phrases.en: Could I get a receipt?
phrases.zh: 可以給我收據嗎？
phrases.tip: 退稅需要收據，記得留好

phrases.en: I'll take this one.
phrases.zh: 我要買這個。
phrases.tip: 決定購買時說

lines.en: Hi there! Can I help you find anything?
lines.zh: 您好！需要幫您找什麼嗎？

lines.en: I'm just looking, thanks. Oh, how much is this jacket?
lines.zh: 我只是看看，謝謝。喔，這件外套多少錢？

lines.en: That one is 89 euros. It also comes in navy and grey.
lines.zh: 那件是 89 歐元，還有深藍色和灰色。

lines.en: Nice. Can I try this on? And do you have it in a bigger size?
lines.zh: 不錯。我可以試穿嗎？還有，有大一號的嗎？

lines.en: Sure. The fitting room is right over there. Let me grab a large for you.
lines.zh: 當然，試衣間就在那邊。我幫您拿件大號的。

lines.en: Thanks. This fits perfectly. I'll take it.
lines.zh: 謝謝，這件剛剛好，我要買這件。

lines.en: Great choice. Will you be paying by card or cash?
lines.zh: 很好的選擇。您要刷卡還是付現？

lines.en: By card, please. Can I get a tax refund on this?
lines.zh: 刷卡，謝謝。這個可以退稅嗎？

lines.en: Yes, you can. Do you have your passport with you?
lines.zh: 可以喔，您有帶護照嗎？

lines.en: I do. Could you fill out the tax refund form for me?
lines.zh: 有，可以幫我辦退稅表嗎？

lines.en: Of course. Here's your form and receipt. Show them at the airport.
lines.zh: 沒問題。這是您的退稅表和收據，在機場出示即可。

lines.en: Perfect, thank you so much!
lines.zh: 太好了，非常謝謝你！

title: 換匯銀行
desc: 換匯、提款機、匯率、刷卡問題

phrases.en: I'd like to exchange some money.
phrases.zh: 我想換一些錢。
phrases.tip: 換匯開場白

phrases.en: I'd like to change these Taiwan dollars into US dollars.
phrases.zh: 我想把台幣換成美金。
phrases.tip: 換成日圓 into Japanese yen

phrases.en: What's the exchange rate today?
phrases.zh: 今天的匯率是多少？
phrases.tip: exchange rate = 匯率

phrases.en: Is there a commission or service fee?
phrases.zh: 有手續費嗎？
phrases.tip: commission / service fee = 手續費

phrases.en: Could I have some smaller bills?
phrases.zh: 可以換一些小鈔嗎？
phrases.tip: small bills = 小鈔，coins = 硬幣

phrases.en: Could you break this into smaller notes?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我把這張換成小鈔嗎？
phrases.tip: break = 找開大鈔

phrases.en: Where is the nearest ATM?
phrases.zh: 最近的提款機在哪裡？
phrases.tip: ATM = 提款機

phrases.en: Can I withdraw cash with this card here?
phrases.zh: 我可以用這張卡在這裡提款嗎？
phrases.tip: withdraw = 提款

phrases.en: The ATM ate my card. What should I do?
phrases.zh: 提款機把我的卡吞了，我該怎麼辦？
phrases.tip: the machine ate my card = 卡被吞了

phrases.en: My card was declined. Can you check why?
phrases.zh: 我的卡刷不過，可以幫我查一下嗎？
phrases.tip: declined = 交易被拒

phrases.en: Do you accept foreign cards?
phrases.zh: 你們收外國的卡嗎？
phrases.tip: 確認是否能用海外卡

phrases.en: Is there a fee for withdrawing cash abroad?
phrases.zh: 海外提款要手續費嗎？
phrases.tip: 跨國提款常有手續費

phrases.en: Can I pay in cash instead?
phrases.zh: 我可以改付現金嗎？
phrases.tip: cash = 現金，card = 信用卡

phrases.en: Could I get a receipt for the exchange?
phrases.zh: 換匯可以給我收據嗎？
phrases.tip: 留收據方便核對

dialogue.title: 在銀行換匯與提款問題

lines.en: Good morning. How can I help you today?
lines.zh: 早安，今天需要什麼服務？

lines.en: Hi, I'd like to exchange some money. Taiwan dollars into US dollars.
lines.zh: 您好，我想換錢，把台幣換成美金。

lines.en: Sure. How much would you like to exchange?
lines.zh: 好的，您想換多少呢？

lines.en: About three hundred dollars' worth. What's the exchange rate today?
lines.zh: 大約三百美金。今天的匯率是多少？

lines.en: Today it's 32.1. There's also a small service fee of two dollars.
lines.zh: 今天是 32.1，另外有兩美元的手續費。

lines.en: That's fine. Could I have some smaller bills, please?
lines.zh: 沒問題。可以給我一些小鈔嗎？

lines.en: No problem. Here you go — mostly twenties and tens.
lines.zh: 沒問題，這是您的錢，大多是二十和十元的。

lines.en: Thanks. By the way, the ATM outside just ate my card. What should I do?
lines.zh: 謝謝。對了，外面的提款機剛把我的卡吞了，我該怎麼辦？

lines.en: I'm sorry to hear that. Was it one of our machines?
lines.zh: 很抱歉聽到這個，是我們的機器嗎？

lines.en: Yes, the one by the entrance. My card was declined and then it kept it.
lines.zh: 對，就是入口那台。我的卡刷不過，然後就被吞進去了。

lines.en: Please fill out this form and we'll retrieve it for you within an hour.
lines.zh: 請填這張表，我們會在一小時內幫您取回。

lines.en: Great, thank you for your help!
lines.zh: 太好了，謝謝你的幫忙！

title: 景點售票
desc: 買門票、開放時間、導覽、拍照

phrases.en: Two adult tickets, please.
phrases.zh: 兩張成人票，謝謝。
phrases.tip: one adult and two children = 一大兩小

phrases.en: Do you have student tickets?
phrases.zh: 有學生票嗎？
phrases.tip: student ticket = 學生票，記得帶學生證

phrases.en: Is there a family ticket?
phrases.zh: 有家庭票嗎？
phrases.tip: family ticket 通常更划算

phrases.en: How much is admission?
phrases.zh: 門票多少錢？
phrases.tip: admission = 入場費

phrases.en: Are children under six free?
phrases.zh: 六歲以下小孩免費嗎？
phrases.tip: 確認兒童優惠

phrases.en: What time do you open and close?
phrases.zh: 你們幾點開門、幾點關門？
phrases.tip: closing time = 關門時間

phrases.en: What time does the last entry start?
phrases.zh: 最後入場時間是幾點？
phrases.tip: last entry = 最後入場

phrases.en: Is there a guided tour?
phrases.zh: 有導覽嗎？
phrases.tip: guided tour = 導覽

phrases.en: Do you have an audio guide in Chinese?
phrases.zh: 有中文的語音導覽嗎？
phrases.tip: audio guide = 語音導覽

phrases.en: Can I take photos here?
phrases.zh: 這裡可以拍照嗎？
phrases.tip: No flash, please = 請勿使用閃光燈

phrases.en: Could you take a photo of us, please?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我們拍張照嗎？
phrases.tip: 請人幫拍照的禮貌說法

phrases.en: Where are the restrooms?
phrases.zh: 廁所在哪裡？
phrases.tip: restroom / toilet = 廁所

phrases.en: Is there a map or a brochure?
phrases.zh: 有地圖或簡介嗎？
phrases.tip: brochure = 簡介手冊

phrases.en: Do we need to book in advance?
phrases.zh: 我們需要事先預約嗎？
phrases.tip: book in advance = 事先預約

lines.en: Hello! How many tickets would you like?
lines.zh: 您好！請問要幾張票？

lines.en: Two adult tickets and one child, please. Do you have student tickets?
lines.zh: 兩張成人票和一張兒童票，謝謝。有學生票嗎？

lines.en: We do. Does anyone have a student ID?
lines.zh: 有的，有人有學生證嗎？

lines.en: My daughter does. And are children under six free?
lines.zh: 我女兒有。還有，六歲以下小孩免費嗎？

lines.en: Yes, under six is free. So that's two adults and one student.
lines.zh: 是的，六歲以下免費。所以是兩張成人加一張學生票。

lines.en: Great. What time do you close today?
lines.zh: 太好了。你們今天幾點關門？

lines.en: We close at six, and the last entry is at five.
lines.zh: 我們六點關門，最後入場時間是五點。

lines.en: Perfect. Is there an audio guide in Chinese?
lines.zh: 很好。有中文的語音導覽嗎？

lines.en: Yes, you can rent one at the desk on your left.
lines.zh: 有的，可以在您左邊的櫃台租借。

lines.en: Thanks. Can I take photos inside?
lines.zh: 謝謝。裡面可以拍照嗎？

lines.en: Photos are fine, but no flash, please. The restrooms are just past the entrance.
lines.zh: 可以拍照，但請勿使用閃光燈。廁所就在入口過去一點。

lines.en: Got it. Thank you so much for your help!
lines.zh: 了解，非常謝謝你的幫忙！

phrases.en: Hi, I'd like to buy a SIM card for internet.
phrases.zh: 你好，我想買一張上網用的SIM卡。
phrases.tip: 也可說 a data SIM card

phrases.en: Do you have a SIM card for tourists?
phrases.zh: 你們有給觀光客用的SIM卡嗎？
phrases.tip: tourist SIM / traveler SIM

phrases.en: How many gigabytes do I get?
phrases.zh: 這張有多少GB？
phrases.tip: GB 唸 gigabytes

phrases.en: How many days is it valid for?
phrases.zh: 可以用幾天？
phrases.tip: valid = 有效

phrases.en: Is it unlimited data?
phrases.zh: 這是吃到飽（無限流量）嗎？
phrases.tip: unlimited = 無限

phrases.en: Which plan is best for a family of four?
phrases.zh: 四口之家用哪個方案最好？

phrases.en: Can you help me set it up?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我裝好嗎？
phrases.tip: set it up = 設定安裝

phrases.en: Can you put the SIM card in for me?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我把SIM卡裝進手機嗎？

phrases.en: I'd like an eSIM instead. Can I scan a QR code?
phrases.zh: 我想要eSIM，可以掃QR碼嗎？
phrases.tip: eSIM 免實體卡

phrases.en: Where do I scan the QR code to activate it?
phrases.zh: 要掃哪裡的QR碼來開通？
phrases.tip: activate = 開通

phrases.en: My data isn't working. Can you check it?
phrases.zh: 我的網路不通，可以幫我看一下嗎？

phrases.en: How do I top up when I run out of data?
phrases.zh: 流量用完了要怎麼儲值？
phrases.tip: top up / recharge = 儲值

phrases.en: Can I top up online with a credit card?
phrases.zh: 可以用信用卡線上儲值嗎？

phrases.en: Excuse me, what's the Wi-Fi password here?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，這裡的Wi-Fi密碼是什麼？

phrases.en: Is there free Wi-Fi in this area?
phrases.zh: 這附近有免費Wi-Fi嗎？

phrases.en: The Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting.
phrases.zh: Wi-Fi一直斷線。
phrases.tip: disconnect = 斷線

lines.en: Hi! How can I help you today?
lines.zh: 你好！有什麼需要幫忙的嗎？

lines.en: Hi, I'd like to buy a SIM card for internet.
lines.zh: 你好，我想買一張上網用的SIM卡。

lines.en: Sure. How many days will you be staying?
lines.zh: 好的，你們會待幾天？

lines.en: Ten days, and we're a family of four.
lines.zh: 十天，我們是四口之家。

lines.en: This plan gives you unlimited data for ten days. Would that work?
lines.zh: 這個方案是十天吃到飽，可以嗎？

lines.en: That sounds great. Can you help me set it up?
lines.zh: 聽起來不錯，可以幫我裝好嗎？

lines.en: Of course. May I see your phone, please?
lines.zh: 當然，可以借你的手機看一下嗎？

lines.en: Here you go. Also, how do I top up if we run out?
lines.zh: 給你。另外，如果用完了要怎麼儲值？

lines.en: You can top up online with a credit card anytime.
lines.zh: 你隨時可以用信用卡在線上儲值。

lines.en: Perfect. My data is working now. Thank you!
lines.zh: 太好了，我的網路通了，謝謝！

title: 藥局
desc: 買成藥、症狀描述、用法用量

phrases.en: Hi, I'm not feeling well. Can you help me?
phrases.zh: 你好，我不太舒服，可以幫我嗎？

phrases.en: I have a headache.
phrases.zh: 我頭痛。
phrases.tip: 換症狀：fever 發燒／stomachache 肚子痛

phrases.en: I have a fever and a sore throat.
phrases.zh: 我發燒又喉嚨痛。
phrases.tip: sore throat = 喉嚨痛

phrases.en: I have diarrhea.
phrases.zh: 我拉肚子。
phrases.tip: diarrhea 唸 /ˌdaɪəˈriːə/

phrases.en: I think I caught a cold.
phrases.zh: 我好像感冒了。
phrases.tip: catch a cold = 感冒

phrases.en: Do you have any painkillers?
phrases.zh: 有沒有止痛藥？
phrases.tip: painkiller / pain reliever

phrases.en: Do you have medicine for an upset stomach?
phrases.zh: 有沒有治肚子不舒服的藥？
phrases.tip: upset stomach = 腸胃不適

phrases.en: Is there something for a runny nose?
phrases.zh: 有沒有治流鼻水的藥？
phrases.tip: runny nose = 流鼻水

phrases.en: How do I take this?
phrases.zh: 這個怎麼吃？

phrases.en: How many times a day should I take it?
phrases.zh: 一天要吃幾次？

phrases.en: Should I take it before or after meals?
phrases.zh: 飯前還是飯後吃？
phrases.tip: before/after meals = 飯前／飯後

phrases.en: Are there any side effects?
phrases.zh: 有沒有副作用？
phrases.tip: side effects = 副作用

phrases.en: Will this make me drowsy?
phrases.zh: 吃了會想睡嗎？
phrases.tip: drowsy = 想睡的

phrases.en: Do I need a prescription for this?
phrases.zh: 這個需要處方嗎？
phrases.tip: prescription = 處方箋

phrases.en: Is this safe for children?
phrases.zh: 小孩可以吃嗎？

phrases.en: I'm allergic to aspirin. Is this okay?
phrases.zh: 我對阿斯匹靈過敏，這個可以吃嗎？
phrases.tip: allergic to = 對…過敏

lines.en: Hello, how can I help you?
lines.zh: 你好，有什麼需要幫忙的嗎？

lines.en: Hi, I'm not feeling well. I think I caught a cold.
lines.zh: 你好，我不太舒服，我好像感冒了。

lines.en: I'm sorry to hear that. What are your symptoms?
lines.zh: 真遺憾，你有哪些症狀？

lines.en: I have a fever, a headache, and a runny nose.
lines.zh: 我發燒、頭痛，還流鼻水。

lines.en: This cold medicine should help. Take one tablet three times a day.
lines.zh: 這個感冒藥應該有幫助，一天吃三次、一次一顆。

lines.en: Should I take it before or after meals?
lines.zh: 飯前還是飯後吃？

lines.en: After meals, please. And drink plenty of water.
lines.zh: 請飯後吃，並多喝水。

lines.en: Are there any side effects? Will it make me drowsy?
lines.zh: 有副作用嗎？吃了會想睡嗎？

lines.en: It might make you a little sleepy, so avoid driving.
lines.zh: 可能會有點想睡，所以不要開車。

lines.en: Got it. One more thing—I'm allergic to aspirin. Is this okay?
lines.zh: 了解。還有一件事，我對阿斯匹靈過敏，這個可以嗎？

lines.en: No aspirin in this one, so you're fine. Feel better soon!
lines.zh: 這款沒有阿斯匹靈，所以沒問題。祝你早日康復！

title: 看病
desc: 掛號、描述病情、拿藥、保險

phrases.en: I'd like to see a doctor, please.
phrases.zh: 我想看醫生。

phrases.en: I don't have an appointment. Is that okay?
phrases.zh: 我沒有預約，可以嗎？
phrases.tip: appointment = 預約

phrases.en: How long is the wait?
phrases.zh: 要等多久？

phrases.en: I've had a fever since yesterday.
phrases.zh: 我從昨天開始發燒。
phrases.tip: since = 從…以來

phrases.en: It hurts here.
phrases.zh: 這裡會痛。
phrases.tip: 邊指邊說最清楚

phrases.en: I have a bad cough and a sore throat.
phrases.zh: 我咳得很厲害，還喉嚨痛。
phrases.tip: cough = 咳嗽

phrases.en: I've been throwing up since this morning.
phrases.zh: 我從早上就一直吐。
phrases.tip: throw up = 嘔吐

phrases.en: The pain is getting worse.
phrases.zh: 越來越痛。
phrases.tip: getting worse = 惡化

phrases.en: I'm allergic to penicillin.
phrases.zh: 我對盤尼西林過敏。
phrases.tip: 換藥名：aspirin 阿斯匹靈

phrases.en: Do I need any medicine?
phrases.zh: 我需要吃藥嗎？

phrases.en: Where can I pick up the medicine?
phrases.zh: 藥要去哪裡拿？
phrases.tip: pick up = 領取

phrases.en: I have travel insurance. Can I get a receipt?
phrases.zh: 我有旅遊保險，可以給我收據嗎？
phrases.tip: receipt = 收據

phrases.en: Can you give me an itemized bill for insurance?
phrases.zh: 可以給我明細收據報保險嗎？
phrases.tip: itemized bill = 明細帳單

phrases.en: Could you write me a medical certificate?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我開診斷證明嗎？
phrases.tip: medical certificate = 診斷證明

phrases.en: How much will this cost?
phrases.zh: 這樣要多少錢？

phrases.en: Do you accept credit cards?
phrases.zh: 可以刷卡嗎？

lines.en: Hi, come in and have a seat. What brings you in today?
lines.zh: 你好，請進坐下。今天哪裡不舒服？

lines.en: I've had a fever since yesterday, and it's getting worse.
lines.zh: 我從昨天開始發燒，而且越來越嚴重。

lines.en: Any other symptoms?
lines.zh: 還有其他症狀嗎？

lines.en: Yes, a bad cough and a sore throat. It hurts here.
lines.zh: 有，咳得很厲害還喉嚨痛，這裡會痛。

lines.en: Let me take a look. Are you allergic to any medication?
lines.zh: 我看一下。你對任何藥物過敏嗎？

lines.en: Yes, I'm allergic to penicillin.
lines.zh: 有，我對盤尼西林過敏。

lines.en: Noted. It looks like a throat infection. I'll prescribe some medicine.
lines.zh: 記下了。看起來是喉嚨發炎，我開些藥給你。

lines.en: Thank you. Where can I pick up the medicine?
lines.zh: 謝謝，藥要去哪裡拿？

lines.en: At the pharmacy next door. Get plenty of rest.
lines.zh: 隔壁的藥局就有，記得多休息。

lines.en: I have travel insurance. Could you write me a medical certificate and an itemized bill?
lines.zh: 我有旅遊保險，可以幫我開診斷證明和明細收據嗎？

lines.en: Of course. The front desk will prepare everything for you.
lines.zh: 當然，櫃台會幫你準備好所有文件。

title: 緊急求助
desc: 報警、東西遺失、求助、找大使館

phrases.en: Help!
phrases.zh: 救命！
phrases.tip: 大聲喊出來

phrases.en: I need help, please.
phrases.zh: 請幫幫我。

phrases.en: Call the police!
phrases.zh: 快報警！
phrases.tip: 很多國家報警打 112

phrases.en: Call an ambulance!
phrases.zh: 叫救護車！
phrases.tip: ambulance = 救護車

phrases.en: It's an emergency.
phrases.zh: 這是緊急狀況。
phrases.tip: emergency = 緊急

phrases.en: I lost my passport.
phrases.zh: 我的護照掉了。
phrases.tip: 換物品：wallet 皮夾／phone 手機

phrases.en: My wallet was stolen.
phrases.zh: 我的皮夾被偷了。
phrases.tip: stolen = 被偷（原形 steal）

phrases.en: Someone took my bag!
phrases.zh: 有人搶了我的包包！

phrases.en: I want to report a theft.
phrases.zh: 我要報案（失竊）。
phrases.tip: theft = 竊盜

phrases.en: Where is the nearest police station?
phrases.zh: 最近的警察局在哪裡？
phrases.tip: police station = 警察局

phrases.en: Where is the nearest hospital?
phrases.zh: 最近的醫院在哪裡？

phrases.en: My child is missing!
phrases.zh: 我的小孩不見了！
phrases.tip: missing = 失蹤

phrases.en: I'm lost. Can you help me?
phrases.zh: 我迷路了，可以幫我嗎？
phrases.tip: lost = 迷路

phrases.en: I need to contact the Taiwan representative office.
phrases.zh: 我要聯絡台灣的辦事處。
phrases.tip: 台灣駐外多為 representative office

phrases.en: Do you have the number for the Taiwan embassy?
phrases.zh: 你有台灣大使館的電話嗎？
phrases.tip: embassy = 大使館

phrases.en: Please write it down for me.
phrases.zh: 請幫我寫下來。
phrases.tip: 慌亂時最好請對方寫下

lines.en: Help! My wallet was stolen!
lines.zh: 救命！我的皮夾被偷了！

lines.en: Calm down. Where did it happen?
lines.zh: 冷靜一點，是在哪裡發生的？

lines.en: On the train, just now. Someone took it from my bag.
lines.zh: 剛剛在火車上，有人從我包包裡拿走的。

lines.en: What was inside?
lines.zh: 裡面有什麼？

lines.en: My cash, credit cards, and my passport.
lines.zh: 現金、信用卡，還有我的護照。

lines.en: Okay, I'll help you file a report. May I see your ID?
lines.zh: 好，我幫你報案，可以看你的身分證件嗎？

lines.en: Here. I want to report a theft. It's an emergency.
lines.zh: 在這裡。我要報案失竊，這是緊急狀況。

lines.en: Understood. You'll need this police report for insurance.
lines.zh: 了解，這份報案證明你辦保險會用到。

lines.en: Thank you. I also need to contact the Taiwan representative office. Do you have the number?
lines.zh: 謝謝。我還需要聯絡台灣辦事處，你有電話嗎？

lines.en: Yes, let me write it down for you.
lines.zh: 有，我幫你寫下來。

lines.en: Thank you so much for your help.
lines.zh: 非常感謝你的幫忙。
